seoTitle: Tempe vs Ten Mile Hollow — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tempe and Ten Mile Hollow. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tempe vs Ten Mile Hollow: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tempe and Ten Mile Hollow.
heading: Tempe vs Ten Mile Hollow — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tempe, New South Wales and Ten Mile Hollow, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ten Mile Hollow has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Tempe (49/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tempe or Ten Mile Hollow safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tempe has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Ten Mile Hollow scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tempe scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Ten Mile Hollow scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tempe or Ten Mile Hollow?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ten Mile Hollow has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

internalLinks.label: Ten Mile Hollow Should I Buy?

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
